chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1240 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Syed Sardar Hussain Shah, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Learned Counsel for the Petitioners states that the Petitioners will be satisfied and would not press instant Petition if the directions are issued to the Deputy Commissioner Tando Allahyar (Respondent No.4) to finalize the letter dated 21.05.2024 (available at Page-27 of the Court file) in respect of appointment of the petitioners on ‘disabled quota’, addressed to him by the Executive Engineer Tubewells Division Tando Jam (Respondent No.2), at the earliest. Learned AAG Sindh present in Court in connection with other cases has waived notice and raises no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of, with direction to the Deputy Commissioner Tando Allahyar (Respondent No.4) to finalize the aforesaid letter dated 21.05.2024 in respect of appointment of the petitioners on ‘disabled quota’ by giving patient hearing to the Petitioners and pass an speaking Order in accordance with law within two months. The application listed at serial No.3 also stands disposed of. At the request of learned AAG Sindh, let a copy of this Order be provided to him for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
